- How routes are registered

6. The request/response types in api/types.go or similar

I need to understand the patterns so I can add a new "rename" feature (POST /api/rename) that copies then deletes the source model.

Please be very thorough and show me the actual code for:
- The CopyRequest type and any similar types
- The Copy client method
- The server handler for copy
- The CLI copy command (if it exists)
- The Delete client method and server handler
- How routes are registered

This will inform my implementation of the rename feature.
